task_completion.description: Set the Fluid node name to 'seawater' and density to 1025.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree or field editor, a Fluid node is selected with its 'name' field set to 'seawater' and 'density' field set to 1025.

task_completion.description: Update the ASV_BATHYMETRY robot to include ImmersionProperties with fluidName 'seawater' and viscousResistanceForceCoefficient 150.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the ASV_BATHYMETRY robot node in the scene tree, an ImmersionProperties node is visible with 'fluidName' set to 'seawater' and 'viscousResistanceForceCoefficient' set to 150.

task_completion.description: Adjust the robot's Physics centerOfMass to [0 0 -0.15].
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Physics node properties for the ASV_BATHYMETRY robot, the 'centerOfMass' field is set to the vector values 0, 0, and -0.15.

task_completion.description: Install a DistanceSensor named 'depth_sonar' with type 'sonar' and maxRange 50.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A DistanceSensor node is visible in the robot's device list or scene tree, with its 'name' field set to 'depth_sonar', 'type' set to 'sonar', and 'maxRange' set to 50.
A 'Save World As' dialog in Webots or a file manager window showing the file 'asv_configured.wbt' being saved to or existing in the /home/ga/Desktop/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Webots GUI to configure the simulation rather than just editing the .wbt file in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Webots application open with the scene tree and field editors being actively used.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application and 3D environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Webots 3D viewport is visible alongside the scene tree, showing the ASV_BATHYMETRY robot.

integrity.description: The agent used the Webots interface to save the world.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Webots 'File' menu or 'Save World As' dialog is visible, indicating the save action originated from the simulator.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is '/home/ga/Desktop/asv_configured.wbt'. The Fluid node must have name 'seawater' and density 1025. The robot definition name is 'ASV_BATHYMETRY'. The ImmersionProperties must have fluidName 'seawater' and viscousResistanceForceCoefficient 150. The Physics centerOfMass must be [0 0 -0.15]. The DistanceSensor must be named 'depth_sonar', have type 'sonar', and maxRange 50.
